analyses.name: Baseline vs Aggressive Savings
analyses.description: Compare current trajectory vs increased savings (24k → 20k expenses)
analyses.focus: How much faster can Daniel retire with 4k/month additional savings?

analyses.name: Baseline vs Conservative Returns
analyses.description: Impact of lower investment returns (7% → 5%) on retirement timeline
analyses.focus: What if investments underperform? How much does this delay retirement?

analyses.name: Impact of Higher Expenses
analyses.focus: Is the retirement plan robust to lifestyle inflation?

analyses.name: Mortgage Payoff Strategy Comparison
analyses.focus: Does accelerating mortgage payoff improve retirement outcomes?

analyses.name: Best Case vs Worst Case
analyses.description: Aggressive savings + market returns vs higher expenses + conservative returns
analyses.focus: What's the range of retirement timing across different scenarios?
